title: ezortea.com.br
description: Estrutural Zortea is a Brazilian company founded in 1995, specializing in the design, fabrication, and assembly of large-scale metal structures. ISO 9001-2015 certified, they provide industrial, logistics, and port solutions throughout the country. Specialties include: roofing for grain warehouses and industrial sheds, hoppers, silos, metal towers, and buildings.
